fileTabs.content:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (
  NOT CAST((
    (
      (
        (
          coalesce(
            CAST((SUBSTRING({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 1, 4)) AS FLOAT64), 
            CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INT64), 
            0)
        ) <= 1958
      )
      AND (
            (
              coalesce(
                CAST((
                  SUBSTRING(
                    (SUBSTRING({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 1, 7)), 
                    (((LENGTH((SUBSTRING({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 1, 7)))) - 2) + 1), 
                    2)
                ) AS FLOAT64), 
                CAST((
                  REGEXP_EXTRACT(
                    (
                      SUBSTRING(
                        (SUBSTRING({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 1, 7)), 
                        (((LENGTH((SUBSTRING({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 1, 7)))) - 2) + 1), 
                        2)
                    ), 
                    '^[0-9]+', 
                    0)
                ) AS INT64), 
                0)
            ) < 8
          )
    )
    AND (
          (
            coalesce(
              CAST((
                SUBSTRING(
                  {{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 
                  (((LENGTH({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }})) - 2) + 1), 
                  2)
              ) AS FLOAT64), 
              CAST((
                REGEXP_EXTRACT(
                  (
                    SUBSTRING(
                      {{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }}, 
                      (((LENGTH({{ var('TEXT_BOX_42') }})) - 2) + 1), 
                      2)
                  ), 
                  '^[0-9]+', 
                  0)
              ) AS INT64), 
              0)
          ) > 0
        )
  ) AS BOOLEAN)
) THEN TRUE
    ELSE ERROR('Error validating config for tool: 60')
  END AS check_config60
